text:
Chronic Conditions file 

2.0 Methods 

The CCW team creates the MBSF Chronic Condition segment file (delivered as the MBSF_CC_YYYY file) to disseminate 
the 27 CCW Chronic Conditions data. The CCW team also creates an MBSF segment file for the 30 CCW Chronic 
Conditions (delivered as the MBSF_CHRONIC_YYYY file). 

1 As a historical note, when CCW data first became available, there were only 21 CCW conditions. When 2010 data became 
available, we revised 17 of the original 21 chronic conditions
